headline: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq 100 Rises Despite Hot PPI, Nvidia Hits Record High
summary: Nasdaq 100 hit a fresh record Wednesday despite a hot 6% April PPI print, as Nvidia rallied for a sixth straight session and Ford surged on a Q1 beat; Dow lagged.
